overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a player walking through the sunlit streets of Night City. The player navigates from a parking lot past graffiti-covered buildings, crosses streets with light traffic, and approaches a massive megastructure while observing the futuristic urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: open parking lot with palm trees and graffiti-covered building

events.description: turns right at the corner of the graffiti-covered building onto the main sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking lot toward the street corner, passing parked vehicles

entered.detail: low-rise building with purple 'FEEL THE HEAT' graffiti and neon accents
tall palm trees lining the edge of the parking area
scattered parked vehicles including a yellow van
tall modern street lamp with multiple fixtures

segments.scene_description: The player begins in a sunlit parking lot surrounded by palm trees and cyberpunk architecture. Walking forward past parked cars, the player approaches a building covered in vibrant purple graffiti before turning right onto the sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: city street intersection with traffic lights and tall buildings

events.description: waits at traffic light then continues walking as vehicles pass by on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk next to the busy street, approaching the intersection

notable_agents.action: blue truck driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: tall cylindrical tower with large '06' signage and industrial texture
overhead traffic signal showing green light
massive floating building structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: Walking along the city street, the player passes traffic lights and observes the tower building marked '06' on the left. Vehicles including a blue truck drive past on the right while the massive megastructure looms ahead in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk approaching massive megastructure building

events.description: camera tilts upward to look at the towering height of the megastructure against the sky

agents.ego_description: walking toward the megastructure while looking up to appreciate its massive scale

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with pink hair walking in the same direction along the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive floating megastructure with geometric patterns and red accent lights
large vertical billboard displaying '35 YEARS' with a figure
large satellite dish arrays mounted on building rooftops

segments.scene_description: The player approaches the imposing megastructure, passing a '35 YEARS' billboard and satellite dishes. The camera tilts upward to reveal the building's full height against the bright sky, showcasing its futuristic architecture with floating sections and industrial details.

events.description: walks into the shadowed area beneath the floating megastructure section

agents.ego_description: walking under the megastructure alongside other pedestrians in the shaded corridor

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in red hoodie walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: underside of the floating megastructure creating a covered walkway
elevated walkway or bridge structure connecting buildings
ground level commercial storefronts with signage

segments.scene_description: Entering the shadowed area beneath the megastructure, the player walks through a covered pedestrian zone. The environment shifts to diffused lighting under the massive overhang, with street-level shops on the right and other pedestrians sharing the walkway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a bright, open parking lot into the imposing shadow of a futuristic megastructure. It begins by moving past palm trees and parked cars toward a building adorned with vibrant purple graffiti before turning right onto a sunlit city sidewalk. As the camera advances along the street, it passes traffic lights and a tower marked 06 while a blue truck drives by, all as the massive megastructure gradually looms larger in the distance. The scene then opens up to reveal a 35 YEARS billboard and satellite dishes, with the camera tilting upward to showcase the building's floating sections and industrial height against the bright sky. Finally, the lighting shifts from brilliant sunlight to diffused shadows as the camera enters a covered pedestrian zone beneath the overhang, passing street-level shops and other pedestrians.
